emails.subject: Re: FERC ruling on Kern expansion
emails.body: Re: FERC ruling on Kern expansion Hmm. Interesting. Thanks for the info. Do we know who got to Breathitt? Forgive me, but what time did we pick to talk today? And will you call me? Best, Jeff

emails.subject: FERC ruling on Kern expansion
emails.body: I think we said we'd call you at 3:00 p.m. CDT. See 'ya then. To: Fawcett, Jeffery

emails.subject: FERC ruling on Kern expansion

emails.subject: Re: FERC ruling on Kern expansion
emails.body: My apologies. Just been "ordered" to be on a 1 PM (PDT) call. Possible to do our call at 2:30 Houston time. Sorry about that. Best, Jeff Jeffery Fawcett/ENRON@enronxgate 04/09/2001 10:34 AM
